> Cyber Security Incident Response Analyst at Proximus Ada. M.Sc. Cybersecurity from Université Libre de Bruxelles.

This is a single-page personal portfolio at https://ayoub.bouhnine.com covering professional experience, education, skills, projects, certifications, CTF participations, and contact information.
